title: Curate GitHub review bodies from review artifacts
summary: Replay a task that restructures published review output while preserving canonical traceability and review artifact contracts.
expected_evidence: published review bodies include a single canonical traceability block
legacy decision or methodology boilerplate is filtered out
pass and request-changes flows share the curated layout
curator_notes: Selected because it stresses review artifact interpretation and output quality without changing the underlying review.json decision contract.
